MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, The John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Tu Uyen Le Donguines.
Attorney, Mercedes A. Gavin is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Corrine Harper and Eugene Jones are present.
Attorney, Teresa L. Friend is representing the defendants.

The Judge Pro Tem Andrea Hartsough, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of December 16, 2013 remains on calendar.
